login.title: Sign in to DOME
login.description: Use your Digital Wallet to securely access the DOME marketplace.
login.qr.description.mobile: Use your Digital Wallet to scan the QR code displayed on the DOME login page on your desktop, or paste the access code.
login.steps.1.title: Open your Digital Wallet
login.steps.1.description: Open your EUDI Wallet or Digital Wallet on your device.
login.steps.2.title: Scan the QR code
login.steps.2.description: Use your wallet to scan the QR code or paste the access code.
login.steps.3.title: Select your credential
login.steps.3.description: Select the credential in your wallet to complete the authentication.
login.wallet.link: Open Digital Wallet to sign in
login.wallet.description: Then scan the QR code or paste the access code.
login.support.question: Need help to sign in?
login.register.question: Don't have an organisation registered yet?
error.title: Authentication Error
error.message: An error occurred during client authentication.
